executives.name: Ken MacKenzie
executives.background: Ken MacKenzie was appointed Chairman in September 2017. He was formerly the Managing Director and CEO of Amcor Limited. He has extensive global experience in complex manufacturing and supply chains.

tenure_dates.title: Managing Director and Chief Executive Officer
